seasonality: Uniswap volume is event-driven, spiking sharply during broad market rallies, token launch frenzies, and meme-coin cycles (e.g., Q1 2024 and Q1 2025 surges tied to memecoin activity and ETF-driven BTC/ETH rallies).
rationale: DefiLlama reports Uniswap trailing 30-day fees annualized at approximately $1.05B as of late May 2025, with TVL near $4.2B across all chains; however, 100% of protocol fees currently accrue to LPs — the UNI token captures zero revenue because the fee switch remains off, making real yield to token holders 0%. The UNI token's market cap (~$7.4B at ~$12.40) divided by annualized LP-fee revenue yields a P/S of ~14x, but this is a vanity metric until governance activates the fee switch. Uniswap v4 launched in Q1 2025 and hooks-driven volume growth is accelerating the fee trajectory.
